description: Petition from ʿImrān b. Khalaf to the Gaon Maṣliaḥ b. Shelomo ha-Kohen (r. 1127-1139). In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100-1138 CE). In which he claims he was "swindled" in his marriage to a woman, because she was "muʿāqa" in impurity, whatever that means; apparently this situation has lasted for several years. In the upper margin some of his specific requests are preserved. On verso there are additional legal notes in the hand of Ḥalfon, unclear if or how they are related. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: עתירה מעמרן בן ח'לף לגאון מצליח בן שלמה הכהן, כ-1127-1139, על תרמית בנישואיו עקב מצב טומאה
